title: The Real Difference Between Your Choices for Selling Online Without Gumroad — No PayPal Required
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: PayPal and Stripe block creators in dozens of countries. Here is the infrastructure that works everywhere they don't.

content.text: You're a creator in a country where PayPal is blocked or your bank doesn't support Stripe, and you've just realized you can't sell your ebooks, courses, or digital art on Gumroad. The restrictions are frustrating, but the good news is that you have other choices. In this post, we'll compare the options so you can find the best PayPal alternative for your situation.
What Each Option Actually Offers

Gumroad alternatives like Payhip and Sellfy are popular, but they still rely on PayPal or Stripe for payment processing. This means you'll have to jump through hoops to get approved, and you'll likely face issues with restricted countries. Other options like Ecwid and Shopify are more comprehensive, but they're also more expensive and have more complex setup processes. Our solution, the Full Stack Bundle, offers a complete store infrastructure, including automated delivery, payment verification, and PDF receipts, without relying on any of these traditional payment processors.
How They Handle Restricted Countries

PayPal and Stripe have strict policies that block countries like Nigeria, Ghana, Pakistan, and several others. Even if you manage to get approved, you'll still face issues with delayed or declined payments. Gumroad's blocked countries list is even longer, making it nearly impossible to sell digital products to customers in restricted regions. Our solution, on the other hand, uses a crypto-native payment processor like NOWPayments, which supports over 300 coins and doesn't require any KYC or buyer account setup.
Payment Speed, Fees, and Real Costs

Traditional payment processors like PayPal and Stripe charge high fees, especially for international transactions. These fees can add up quickly, eating into your profits. Gumroad's fees are a bit lower, but they still take a 3.5% + $0.30 per sale. Our solution, the Full Stack Bundle, charges a one-time payment of $79.99, with no ongoing fees or subscription costs. This means you keep 100% of your sales revenue, minus the cost of the bundle.
Our crypto-native payment processor supports over 300 coins, making it easy to accept payments from customers in restricted countries.
Automation and Delivery Capabilities

Automated delivery is a must-have for any digital product seller, but traditional platforms like Gumroad and Payhip tend to fall short. Our solution, the Full Stack Bundle, includes the Core Engine, which automates delivery, payment verification, and PDF receipts, so you can focus on creating and selling your products. You'll also get the Admin Dashboard, which provides real-time analytics and order management.

How do I sell digital products if PayPal is not available in my country?

The direct answer is NOWPayments combined with the Core Shop Engine. NOWPayments is a crypto payment processor that requires no KYC from merchants and no account creation from buyers. It supports over 300 coins and sends a webhook to your backend when a payment confirms on-chain. The Core Shop Engine receives that webhook, verifies the transaction, generates a receipt, and delivers the product automatically. The key difference between this and a platform workaround is that it is not a workaround — it is a different infrastructure layer entirely. There is no platform that can suspend your access, no compliance team that can flag your account, and no payout schedule that delays your revenue. Your funds go directly to a wallet you control the moment a transaction confirms.
Our solution includes automated delivery, payment verification, and PDF receipts, so you can focus on creating and selling your products.
